โครงสร้างโมเลกุล / The Structure of Molecules

Molecules are generally particles formed when two or more atoms are chemically joined ("bonded"). Structural formulas show the arrangement of atoms in molecules. Single (—) and double (═) strokes represent bonds. H atoms have 1 bond, O atoms have 2 bonds, C atoms have 4 bonds.


Hydrogen molecule (H₂)

Oxygen molecule (O₂)

Methane molecule (CH₄)

Sometimes molecules containing carbon can be drawn shorthand:


Cyclohexene

Cyclohexene (shorthand)
